LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE LAW FIRM OF BERDING & WEIL LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF AVANT CANYON GROUP INCORPORATED DBA CANYON CONSTRUCTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-01-2016 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
